per_outcome.operationalization: Percentage of correct classifications of whether individuals in photographs were over 21, based on participant probability judgments compared to true age status
Negative absolute value of net confidence, calculated as the difference between participant confidence levels and actual correctness across judgments
Interquartile range of accuracy scores across participants; measures dispersion/inequality rather than individual speed or quality of task performance
Percentage of trials where participant's response matched the AI recommendation within one percentage point; measures behavioral compliance rather than output quality
